metadata.title: Spain Contractor Management Services | Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Spain contractor management and compliant contractor onboarding. Engage freelancers and autónomos in Spain without entity. Spanish classification, IRPF, VAT, false self-employment risk. Fast onboarding.

faqs.title: Spain Contractor FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about contractor management in Spain.

items.question: What is false self-employment (falso autónomo) in Spain?
items.answer: It occurs when someone registered as self-employed (autónomo) is actually in a dependent employment relationship. Authorities and labour inspectors can reclassify the relationship, leading to back Seguridad Social, wages, and penalties. We help structure genuine contractor and autónomo engagements.

items.question: How fast can I onboard a contractor in Spain?
items.answer: Typically 2–5 business days once engagement details are clear. We handle contracts, NIF/NIE checks, VAT (IVA) documentation where needed, and compliance screening for Spain.

items.question: Can I convert a contractor to an employee later?
items.answer: Yes. If the role should be employment, we can onboard them via Spain EOR with a contrato de trabajo, Seguridad Social, statutory vacation, and compliant payroll.

items.question: Do you support payments to Spanish autónomos?
items.answer: Yes. We support invoicing-based payments in EUR with documentation aligned to Spanish tax and social rules for self-employed contractors.

items.question: What about IRPF and IVA for contractors in Spain?
items.answer: Autónomos pay IRPF (withholdings may apply on invoices) and register for IVA when required. We help ensure documentation and withholding treatment match the engagement type.
